title: govenia brevilabris
intro: Govenia brevilabris, also known as the short-lipped govenia, is a type of orchid plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Govenia brevilabris include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
